meaning: n.原为脊髓病患者举行的运动会
examples: She entered the final of the 100 meters in the 2012 London Paralympics.
Last year, she won silver at the Swedish Championships, and now she is preparing for the Tokyo Paralympics.
The man born with disability became the champion of the Paralympics, which was very honourable.
Mr Hughes took part in shot and javelin events and competed in the 1992 Barcelona Paralympics.
He was also confident that the Paralympics had displayed disabled people in a positive light.
